title: thelypteris hochreutineri
intro: Thelypteris hochreutineri, also known as Hochreutiner's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris hochreutineri include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional practices, it is also used in poultices or applied topically to the affected area.
